name: CHECKROWUSESDREF
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[CHECKROWUSESDREF] ON [dbo].[SIPARISHAREKETLERI]
AFTER DELETE 
AS 
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;     
	IF EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM STOKHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SD_REF IN (SELECT SD_REF FROM deleted))
	begin rollback transaction RAISERROR ('SD_REF in use.' , 16, 1) end
    IF EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SD_REF IN (SELECT SD_REF FROM deleted))
	begin rollback transaction RAISERROR ('SD_REF in use.' , 16, 1) end
END
